title: TNT Grenades
body:
# **TNT Grenades**

**-----------------**

TNT grenades is a small mod combat/PvP which does not add any new items, instead, it lets you, the player throw TNT, bricks, netherbricks and end crystals towards your enemies. Killing enemy mobs, killing your future dinner, destroying your friends house because he killed your wolf or even mine to easily, lavishing in riches! 

Also a great replacement to beds for nether mining if you have a large gunpowder farm!

All you have to do to throw TNT; is put your flint and steel into your offhand, and clutch your TNT in your main, and just right click! And watch the world burn around you.

To throw End Crystals its pretty much the same except that you must have obsidian in your offhand and TNT in your mainhand.

For bricks & Nether bricks you can throw them without any need to have something in your offhand.

**-----------------**

Please report bugs and join our community [Discord](https://discord.gg/YdgyNJ8Kv6)
You can use this in modpacks, granted said modpack is not paid for/commercial in any other way.
